message:
fix(node): saturating arithmetic for timeout/clock computations + rustfmt

Two new saturating arithmetic fixes preventing potential overflow in
multiplication:
- obligation_tracker.rs: leak_timeout_secs * 1000 → saturating_mul(1000)
  to prevent overflow on very large timeout values converting seconds to ms
- supervision.rs: (len as u64 + 1) * 1000 → saturating_add(1).saturating_mul(1000)
  to prevent overflow in computed_now_ms mock clock

Rustfmt reformatting of existing u32::try_from chains (no behavioral change):
- durability.rs: Reflow try_from().unwrap_or() chain to single line
- crash_loop_detector.rs: Same single-line reflow for try_from chain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
